modules.name: User Accounts & Identity
modules.description: Email, Google, Apple login; profile editing; profile photo; password reset; multi-device login; two-factor authentication; device limits.

modules.name: Student Dashboard
modules.description: Study progress, exam countdown, daily goals, weak area alerts, recommended lessons, notifications, streaks, recent activity.

modules.name: Virtual Classroom
modules.description: Built-in HD video, screen share, whiteboard, chat, raise hand, polls, breakout rooms, host controls, waiting room, attendance, recordings, calendar reminders.

modules.name: Video Learning
modules.description: Recorded lectures, playlists, offline downloads for premium users, playback speed, picture-in-picture, resume position, video notes.

modules.name: NCLEX Question Bank
modules.description: Full topic bank with NGN case studies, bow tie, matrix, highlight text, cloze, SATA, drag/drop, ordered response, audio and image questions.

modules.name: Practice & Exam Modes
modules.description: Practice, tutor mode, timed exams, CAT simulator, custom quiz builder, readiness exams, daily quiz, weekly challenge.

modules.name: Rationales & Review
modules.description: Correct/wrong answer explanations, nursing tips, references, bookmarks, personal notes, error reports.

modules.name: Analytics
modules.description: Overall score, topic performance, NGN readiness, pass probability, daily/weekly/monthly reports, at-risk student detection.

modules.name: AI Learning Assistant
modules.description: AI tutor, rationale explainer, AI quiz generator, AI study planner, weak area detector, lesson summarizer, voice assistant.

modules.name: Flashcards & Pharmacology
modules.description: Drug flashcards, disease cards, lab values, spaced repetition, drug classifications, MOA, side effects, contraindications, calculations.

modules.name: Resources
modules.description: Notes, care plans, concept maps, ECG, ABG, isolation precautions, drug handbook, abbreviations, protocols, worksheets.

modules.name: Community
modules.description: Discussion forum, study groups, ask instructors, comments, announcements, mentor groups, success stories.

modules.name: Assignments
modules.description: Homework, quiz submissions, uploads, instructor grading, feedback, deadlines.

modules.name: Payments
modules.description: Free plan, subscription plans, promo codes, referrals, Mobile Money, cards, Stripe, PayPal, receipts, reconciliation.

modules.name: Certificates
modules.description: Completion, attendance, readiness exam certificates with verification code.

modules.name: Admin & Instructor Tools
modules.description: User/instructor management, uploads, exam creation, analytics, subscriptions, announcements, attendance, grading, messages.

modules.name: Professional Add-ons
modules.description: Sponsor portal, career center, USRN checklist, visa/interview prep, resume builder, job board, CPD and OSCE expansion.

modules.name: Security
modules.description: Encrypted data, 2FA, role-based access, audit logs, backups, screenshot controls, suspicious activity tracking.

modules.name: Scalability
modules.description: Android, iOS, web, cloud database, push notifications, offline capability, AI integration, scalable architecture for thousands of users.
